# Rule Engine & Sandbox Mode

Available on **Advanced** and **Ultimate**.

## How stacking works

Every earning rule is its own program. When a customer takes an action (e.g. places an order), Joy evaluates **all active programs** and applies every program whose conditions are met. Rules **stack** unless conditions prevent overlap.

## Use case patterns

| Pattern | Example |
|---|---|
| Always-on base | 1 pt per $1 spent on every order |
| Collection multiplier | 2× points on "Summer Collection" |
| Tag-based bonus | 50 bonus points on eco-tagged products |
| Clearance accelerator | 3× points on clearance items |
| Seasonal campaign | Black Friday week bonus |
| Customer segment | Bonus for VIP tier or tagged customers |
| Time-based | Weekend or after-hours bonus |
| Birthday-month booster | Extra multiplier during birth month |
| POS-only | In-store recycle return bonus |

Set conditions in each program's **Check if** panel: Customer / Order / Product / Collection — combined with **All** or **Any** logic.

---

Available on **All plans**. Located at **Joy Admin → Reward programs → Sandbox Mode**.

## Setup

1. Enable Joy widget embed: **Theme editor → App embeds → Joy Loyalty - Widget → Save**
2. Toggle Sandbox Mode on → Confirm
3. Add test accounts — only these accounts earn points while sandbox is active

A banner shows in admin while sandbox is on. Regular customers' sign-ups and orders won't generate points until you turn it off.

## How to test your program in Sandbox mode

Once Sandbox mode is on, the page shows a yellow **"Sandbox mode"** badge and the banner *"Currently in sandbox mode — only test list customers will earn points."* To test:

1. Go to **Joy Admin → Reward programs**. With sandbox on, a **Test list** button appears at the top right (next to "Upgrade to Rule engine").
2. Click **Test list** → the **"Test mode email whitelist"** popup opens. Enter the email address(es) you want to test with — **one per line or comma-separated** — then click **Confirm**. Only these accounts earn points while test mode is active.
3. Sign in to the storefront with one of those test customer accounts and **perform the actions in the earning programs you've set up** (e.g. place an order, sign up, leave a review) to check that points are awarded correctly.
4. Verify the points landed by checking that customer under **Joy Admin → Customers** (or in the loyalty widget while signed in as the test account).

Because only whitelisted emails earn points, you can validate your setup end-to-end without affecting real customers. Turn Sandbox mode off when you're ready to go live.
